sessions_sample.raw: Adjust pacing, power output, and expectations. When traveling, allow yourself 10–20 days to fully acclimate to altitude.

unhandled_patterns.pattern: 10–20 days to fully acclimate to altitude.
unhandled_patterns.issue: The parser may not recognize time frames as relevant to training plans.
unhandled_patterns.suggested_rule: Recognize time frames (e.g., '10–20 days') as important for acclimatization and recovery periods.

unhandled_patterns.suggested_rule: Include hydration recommendations as part of training session details.
